title: 4Pcs Plastic Math Geometry Kit, Transparent Measuring Tool Set for School Student Teacher Architects Engineers, Includes Protractor Straight Ruler Triangle Ruler, Clear 4 Pack
features: 【PRODUCT DETAILS】- Material: ABS Plastic ; Color: Transparent; Type: Math Geometry Kit; Package Includes: 1x 20 CM / 8 Inch Straight Ruler, 1x 60 Degrees Triangle Ruler, 1x 45 Degrees Triangle Ruler, 1x 180 Degrees Protractor; Total Weight: about 1.6 oz / 46 g.

【HIGH QUALITY】- The clear math geometry kit is made of quality ABS plastic, sturdy and durable. The scale is printed clearly on the surface, not easy to fade. Light weight makes them more convenient to be used.

【PERFECT GIFT】- The plastic math ruler set is the ideal gifts to reward kids for good learning, birthdays and holidays. They are easy to read the scale and can be measured accurately, perfect for school work or activities that require a straight line or draw triangulars. It's a great choice to share them with teachers and students.

【EASY TO USE】- The math tools are transparent, so that you can clearly see the lines, words, numbers and letters on books. You can easily measure objects or draw a triangle with our clear math rulers, they're perfect math measuring tools.

【WIDELY USED】- The plastic math geometry Kit is suitable for studying length and angle measurements in school, also can be widely used for pupils, middle school students, teachers, office staffs, architects, engineers, artists, designers etc. It's a good gift for your family and friends.
【PACKAGE INCLUDES】- 1 Pcs 20 CM / 8 Inch Straigh Ruler; 1 Pcs 45 Degrees Triangle Ruler; 1 Pcs 60 Degrees Triangle Ruler; 1 Pcs Semicircle Protractor.
